edit.title: Edit transaction
edit.deleteError: Could not delete. Please try again.

edit.fixedNote: Fixed expense — changes affect following months
edit.fixedDeleteNote: Delete fixed expense? It will disappear from all months.
edit.confirmCancelFixed: This will cancel the recurring transaction from this month onwards. Previous months will not be affected.
edit.fixedLocked: This transaction already occurred and cannot be modified.
edit.scopePickerTitle: Which transactions do you want to affect?
edit.scopeOnlyThisDesc: This month will be skipped, but the recurring will continue normally.
edit.scopeFromNowDesc: The recurring will be cancelled from here. Previous months untouched.
edit.scopeAllDesc: Will disappear from all months, no exceptions.
edit.scopeOnlyThisInstallmentDesc: Other installments will not be affected.
edit.scopeFromNowInstallmentDesc: This installment and all remaining ones will be deleted.
edit.scopeConfirmFixed_single: Only this month will be skipped. The recurring will continue in following months.
edit.scopeConfirmFixed_fromNow: The recurring will be cancelled from this month. Previous months are not affected.
edit.scopeConfirmFixed_all: The recurring will be permanently deleted from all months.
edit.scopeConfirmInstallment_single: Only this installment will be deleted. Others remain.
edit.scopeConfirmInstallment_fromNow: This installment and all following ones in this group will be deleted.

search.notFoundSub: Check the username and try again

list.empty: You don't have any friends on Spendia yet
list.emptySub: Search by username to add friends

remove.dialogDescBefore: Are you sure you want to remove

friends.pageDesc: Connect and share expenses with your friends

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pageDesc: Stay up to date with the latest updates
notifications.shared_delete_request: {{fromDisplayName}} requests to delete the shared expense: {{description}}
notifications.goal_monthly_reminder: Remember to add to your {{count}} active goals this month 🎯

whatsNew.title: What can you do?
whatsNew.subtitle: Explore the main features of Spendia.

sharedExpenses.title: Shared expenses
sharedExpenses.item1: Share any expense with one or more Spendia friends
sharedExpenses.item2: Each participant sees it automatically in their history
sharedExpenses.item3: Anyone can delete the expense for all with one tap

splitCalc.title: Proportional split
splitCalc.item1: Split equally or set custom percentages per person
splitCalc.item2: Real-time preview of the exact amount per person
splitCalc.item3: Works with installments and interest rates automatically

newForm.title: Full-screen form
newForm.item1: The + button now opens a dedicated screen with more space
newForm.item2: Same flow as always: amount, category, card, date
newForm.item3: The sharing section appears at the bottom, out of the way

syncHistory.title: Synced history
syncHistory.item1: Shared expenses show a 👥 chip in the transaction list
syncHistory.item2: You see your exact share of the amount, not the total
syncHistory.item3: Instant notifications when someone shares an expense with you

budget.title: Monthly budget
budget.item2: Visual progress chart in real time
budget.item3: Smart control of fixed transactions across months

friends.title: Friends system
friends.item2: Send, accept or reject friend requests
friends.item3: Manage your friends list from your profile

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.item1: Numeric badge for unread notifications in real time
notifications.item2: Tap to mark as read individually
notifications.item3: Delete notifications or mark all as read in one tap

navbarRedesign.title: Redesigned navbar
navbarRedesign.item1: Animated pill perfectly centered on the active icon
navbarRedesign.item2: Smooth fade-in and fade-out animation when switching tabs
navbarRedesign.item3: Cleaner design: pill inside the icon container, no manual position math

improvements.title: General improvements
improvements.item1: Fingerprint / Face ID for quick unlock
improvements.item2: Redesigned email and PIN sign-in screen
improvements.item3: Unified visual design across the entire app

badges.title: Credit/debit badge
badges.item1: Recent transactions on the home screen now show a 'C' badge for credit and 'D' for debit
badges.item2: Identify at a glance which card you used for each expense
badges.item3: Color changes by type: blue for credit, green for debit

versionedNews.title: Versioned what's new
versionedNews.item1: This screen now shows only the changes for the current version
versionedNews.item2: No more repeated updates from previous versions
versionedNews.item3: Each version brings its own list of improvements

savingsGoals.title: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.item1: Create goals with name, emoji, and target amount
savingsGoals.item2: Log savings and track your progress with a visual bar
savingsGoals.item3: Reach your goal and celebrate with a special animation 🎉

toolsHub.title: Tools Hub
toolsHub.item1: New Tools tab with centralized access to features
toolsHub.item2: Manage Categories and Goals from one place
toolsHub.item3: More tools coming soon to supercharge your finances

annualReport.title: Annual PDF Report
annualReport.item1: Generate your fiscal year transaction report
annualReport.item2: Category breakdown with totals and item list
annualReport.item3: Perfect for your accountant or personal archive

sentIncomeFeature.title: Send income to friends
sentIncomeFeature.item1: Log an expense and send it as income to another Spendia user
sentIncomeFeature.item2: Your friend sees it automatically in their history as received income
sentIncomeFeature.item3: Perfect for reimbursements, transfers, or splitting bills informally

friendReport.title: Friend expense report
friendReport.item1: Select a friend and month to see all shared transactions between you
friendReport.item2: Instantly identify who owes who and how much with the net balance
friendReport.item3: Generate a downloadable and shareable image with every transaction detailed

annualReportImage.title: Annual report as images
annualReportImage.item1: The annual report is now generated as high-quality images instead of PDF
annualReportImage.item2: Download each page or share it directly from the app
annualReportImage.item3: Improved visual design with summary, categories and yearly movements

customCategories.title: Custom categories
customCategories.item1: Create your own categories with a unique icon and name
customCategories.item2: Now displayed correctly in home, history and detail
customCategories.item3: Organize your expenses and income exactly as you need

spendiaDomain.title: Now at spendia.co
spendiaDomain.item1: The app has its own domain: spendia.co
spendiaDomain.item2: Google sign-in is now more stable and secure
spendiaDomain.item3: Install Spendia as a PWA directly from spendia.co

expenseGroups.title: Group Expenses
expenseGroups.item1: Create groups for trips or outings and track who paid what
expenseGroups.item2: Automatically calculate who owes whom and how much
expenseGroups.item3: Settle or reopen groups with a single tap

editTransactionParity.title: Improved edit transaction
editTransactionParity.item1: AI-powered auto-categorization when typing the description
editTransactionParity.item2: Create custom categories directly while editing
editTransactionParity.item3: Quick description suggestions and full card selector

visualPolish.title: Visual improvements
visualPolish.item1: Smooth, seamless aurora animation on login in both dark and light mode
visualPolish.item2: Animated blobs now visible in light mode with subtle cyan tones
visualPolish.item3: Google button fixed in dark mode with a solid background

transactionDetail.title: Transaction detail & editing
transactionDetail.item1: See the full breakdown of every expense and income
transactionDetail.item2: Edit any field directly from the detail view
transactionDetail.item3: Change the date with an intuitive visual picker

auroraBackground.title: Animated background across the app
auroraBackground.item1: Aurora effect with 6 floating circles on every screen
auroraBackground.item2: Smooth, continuous animation that persists while navigating
auroraBackground.item3: Different intensities per screen, adapts to light and dark mode

defaultCard.title: Default card for expenses
defaultCard.item1: Mark a card as default when adding or editing it
defaultCard.item2: Auto-selected when logging a new expense
defaultCard.item3: Star badge ★ in My Cards to identify it at a glance

cardManagement.title: Full card editing
cardManagement.item1: Edit bank, type, name and default directly from My Cards
cardManagement.item2: Redesigned action buttons with tinted squircle backgrounds
cardManagement.item3: Change the bank directly inside the edit form

auroraBlur.title: Improved aurora background
auroraBlur.item1: Soft blur effect over the animated background circles
auroraBlur.item2: Adaptive intensity: subtle in light mode, stronger in dark
auroraBlur.item3: Animations keep flowing smoothly with the new effect

toolCardsRedesign.title: Redesigned tool cards
toolCardsRedesign.item1: Solid background with better contrast over the animated aurora
toolCardsRedesign.item2: Subtle shadow with a tint from the app's primary palette
toolCardsRedesign.item3: Perfectly rounded corners on both Android and iOS

sharedFixedPerms.title: Improved shared expenses
sharedFixedPerms.item1: Fixed shared expenses now correctly propagate to future months
sharedFixedPerms.item2: Only the owner can edit or delete a shared expense
sharedFixedPerms.item3: If you're not the owner, you can send a deletion request to the creator

balanceCardRedesign.title: Redesigned Balance Card
balanceCardRedesign.item1: New elegant design with frosted glass translucent background
balanceCardRedesign.item2: Income and expenses in a single clean row with subtle divider
balanceCardRedesign.item3: Bold typography for better readability of your figures

friendReportImproved.title: Improved friend report
friendReportImproved.item1: Shared expenses now included with correct direction: what you owe and what they owe
friendReportImproved.item2: Net balance reflects all movements: sent, received and shared
friendReportImproved.item3: Unified view grouped by date with direction icons

responsiveViewer.title: Adaptive viewer
responsiveViewer.item1: Image and PDF viewer now adapts to tablets and desktop screens
responsiveViewer.item2: Inactivity timeout extended to 5 minutes for more comfort
responsiveViewer.item3: Centered content optimized for large screens

paletteSelector.title: Customize your color palette
paletteSelector.item1: Choose from multiple palettes in your profile
paletteSelector.item2: Each palette transforms colors, aurora, and gradients across the app
paletteSelector.item3: Your selection is saved automatically for future sessions

darkOverlay.title: Deeper dark background
darkOverlay.item1: Subtle dark overlay on the background in dark mode
darkOverlay.item2: Components stand out more clearly against the background
darkOverlay.item3: Animated aurora stays visible beneath an elegant veil

editCardDialogFit.title: More compact dialogs
editCardDialogFit.item1: The edit card dialog now fits its content without unnecessary scrolling
editCardDialogFit.item2: The bottom sheet only takes up as much space as its visible fields require
editCardDialogFit.item3: Everything visible at a glance when editing — no scrolling needed

uiPolish.title: Design improvements and fixes
uiPolish.item1: New fully rounded tab selector applied across the entire app
uiPolish.item2: Palettes reorganized into 2 groups (Classic / Pastel) with correctly translated names
uiPolish.item3: Fix: group expense screen no longer gets stuck on loading

hideAmounts.title: Hide your amounts with a tap
hideAmounts.item1: Tap the eye icon on the home screen to hide all amounts at once
hideAmounts.item2: Perfect for checking the app in public without exposing your finances
hideAmounts.item3: Your preference is saved automatically between sessions

premiumExperience.title: Tailored views for Premium
premiumExperience.item1: Premium users get an exclusive navbar design with a subtle breathing animation
premiumExperience.item2: Special welcome screen when activating Premium with direct access to key features
premiumExperience.item3: PRO badge visible on your profile to identify your account at a glance

premiumWelcome.title: Renewed Premium experience
premiumWelcome.item1: Exclusive welcome screen when activating Premium with direct access to all your features
premiumWelcome.item2: Special gradient navbar that sets your premium account apart
premiumWelcome.item3: Unlock Spendia's full potential: advanced budgets, reports and more

otpPinReset.title: Recover your PIN by email
otpPinReset.item1: Forgot your PIN? Request a verification code sent directly to your email
otpPinReset.item2: Secure 6-digit code with themed design and automatic expiration
otpPinReset.item3: Your account stays protected throughout the entire recovery process

animatedSplash.title: New animated loading screen
animatedSplash.item1: Splash screen with professional animation: glow, shimmer and smooth spring physics
animatedSplash.item2: The Spendia logo comes to life with light effects on every app launch
animatedSplash.item3: Fluid transition from the splash screen to sign in

sentIncome.deleteRequestConfirm: You cannot delete this income directly. A request will be sent to whoever registered it to delete it.

expenseGroups.pageDesc: Track who paid what and calculate who owes whom
